data.name: Curse Errant
data.detailed_description:
"Curse Errant" is an RPG game produced by く～るシスター and published by Hanabi games.



In her quest to learn the ways of chivalry, the red-haired knight Giselle found herself serving under Sharon's princess-to-be, Lana. Together, they will uncover the secrets clouding the lands and learn the true meaning behind their destinies. No curse is too powerful to hinder them, no sword is too sharp to cut them down. This is the story of the Curse-Errant Knight.

This game is a role-playing game featuring a turn-based combat system. It is characterized by a rich and immersive storyline, excellent visual effects and atmospheric music.







  • Turn-based RPG Combat with an TP Management Feature
  • Exploration
  • Side Quests
  • Events
data.about_the_game:
"Curse Errant" is an RPG game produced by く～るシスター and published by Hanabi games.



In her quest to learn the ways of chivalry, the red-haired knight Giselle found herself serving under Sharon's princess-to-be, Lana. Together, they will uncover the secrets clouding the lands and learn the true meaning behind their destinies. No curse is too powerful to hinder them, no sword is too sharp to cut them down. This is the story of the Curse-Errant Knight.

This game is a role-playing game featuring a turn-based combat system. It is characterized by a rich and immersive storyline, excellent visual effects and atmospheric music.







  • Turn-based RPG Combat with an TP Management Feature
  • Exploration
  • Side Quests
  • Events
data.short_description: Embark on a royal quest, exploring the lands outlying the matriarchy of Sharon. Discover what awaits the flaming-haired knight, Giselle and her master, Lana, as they uncover the darkest of secrets surrounding the mysteries behind their pact and the succession to the throne.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 MB 可用空間
